plugin.description: Alerts when configured preload metadata appears in the current area.
preloads.header.color.tooltip: Sets the color of the preload
preloads.header.display_name.tooltip: Sets the name that appears in the preload window. Press Enter to save changes.
preloads.header.log.tooltip: Log to file when preload found in area/zone.
preloads.header.path.tooltip: Path of the preload you want to show in the preload window. Press Enter to save changes.
preloads.header.priority.tooltip: Sets the priority of the preload. Lower numbers show up at the top of the preload window.
preloads.none_found: No important preload found. Did you forget to copy preload.txt file in the preload alert plugin folder?
settings.description: If you find something new and want to add it to the preload you can use Core -> Data Visualization -> CurrentAreaLoadedFiles feature.
settings.hide_in_town_hideout: Hide when in town or hideout
settings.lock_window.tooltip: You can also lock it by double clicking the preload window. However, you can only unlock it from here.
settings.show_time_since_last_map: Show time since last map opened
window.not_updated_hideout: Preloads are not updated in hideout.
window.not_updated_town: Preloads are not updated in town.
